more.title: International Workers’ Day: CWGH calls for urgent health investment, warns of rising diseases and worker risks

more.title: Zimbabwe targets gold surge with nationwide artisanal miner training programme
more.description: Government will roll out a nationwide training programme for artisanal and small-scale miners as part of efforts to formalise the sector and boost gold output, Mines Minister Polite Kambamura said on Thursday. Addressing a graduation ceremony for 300 artisanal miners in Chegutu, Kambamura said the initiative being piloted at Mutapa Gold Resources owned Elvington Mine [...] The post Zimbabwe targets gold surge with nationwide artisanal miner training programme appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: Rock art, dance and ritual: what we learned from paintings in Zimbabwe
more.description: The Conversation Rock paintings are found throughout Zimbabwe. They were made during the last 10,000 years by hunter gatherer groups and later by farming communities. These came to the attention of the ERC Artsoundscapes project, based in Spain, in 2021. The project brings together experts in archaeology, ethnography, psychology and acoustic engineering to explore how humans understood [...] The post Rock art, dance and ritual: what we learned from paintings in Zimbabwe appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .
